element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defensive maneuver for evasion and positioning
Standard opposition in rail shooter segments
Bridge between rail segments and main boss
End-of-stage challenge requiring camera perspective adaptation
Third-person to top-down view swap during boss encounters

typical_relief_triggers: Enemy waves cleared during rail sections
typical_tension_triggers: Increasing enemy density in rail sections
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating intensity within each stage from rail shooting setup to climactic boss battle; perspective shifts punctuate tension peaks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces helicopter controls, guns, missiles, and air brake in Stage 1; rail shooter structure provides linear guidance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 2-3 escalate enemy density and variety; sub-bosses appear with increasing frequency
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stage 4 presents final campaign challenge with combined enemy patterns and complex boss mechanics
notable_spikes: First boss battle (perspective shift and unfamiliar top-down control paradigm)
Sub-boss encounters (break rhythm of rail shooting)
Final stage bosses (accumulated pattern mastery required)

notable_level_patterns.description: Every stage follows identical template: third-person rail shooting segment with military vehicle elimination → sub-boss encounter → perspective shift to top-down vertical scrolling shooter format for main boss battle

Camera shifts from behind-helicopter (Space Harrier-style, player-forward) to top-down (strategic overview) marking transition from traversal to combat focus; mechanical shift mirrors psychological escalation
Guns and missiles available throughout without introduction progression; air brake serves as sole defensive tool, requiring skill mastery rather than equipment unlocking
